decision.archive_summary: Active issue remains the same UX bug: the user cannot directly see per-turn context size in Codex, and says the plugin is wrong; they want an explicit, intuitive context-size display before judging whether improvements worked. Earlier implementation/status updates about Stage 12 pause and prior reductions/compression were intermediate progress and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Preserve the user's hard priority that if this problem is not solved, other work should stop.
